title: Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game Delayed on Xbox Until September and the Switch Version Will Not Have Cross-Play
summary: The game based on the series Avatar: The Last Airbender suffers a last-minute delay on Xbox and will lack cross-play on its Switch launch.

title: Halo: Campaign Evolved Launches on PlayStation After 25 Years and Sparks Controversy Over Early Access on Xbox
summary: The remake of the classic Halo arrives on PlayStation for the first time, while Xbox players report issues accessing paid early content.

title: Steam Revamps Wishlist with Categories and Improvements to Gifting Games
summary: Valve implements new organization features for the wishlist and makes it easier to send games as gifts on its digital store.

title: European Commission Approves Saudi Arabia's $55 Billion Purchase of EA
summary: The acquisition of the giant Electronic Arts by the Saudi sovereign wealth fund passes regulatory scrutiny in the EU, paving the way for the largest private deal in history.

title: New Resident Evil Movie Releases Trailer That Directly Connects to the Games
summary: The trailer for the film adaptation shows direct references to the video game saga and promises to surpass previous versions.

title: Bethesda Union Reports Illegal Layoffs and Minimum Payouts After Xbox Cuts
summary: Bethesda workers were laid off on the same day as the announcement of new Fallout games, receiving the lowest possible severance, according to the union.

title: Marvel's Wolverine Debuts New Trailer and Sparks Controversy Over Logan's Unmasked Look
summary: The Wolverine game generates debate among fans over the character design and the performance that frightened the lead actor.

title: Xbox Tests Free Cloud Gaming with Advertisements
summary: Microsoft begins testing a cloud gaming service funded by advertising, allowing playing without a paid subscription.

title: Former Disney CEO Does Not Remember Approving Kingdom Hearts Development
summary: Michael Eisner admits he does not remember the reasons he greenlit the crossover between Disney and Final Fantasy.

title: Miyamoto Defends Nintendo's Strategy of Releasing Remakes Like Zelda: Ocarina of Time
summary: The creator of Mario explains that remakes meet player demand and are a good way to keep franchises alive.

title: Splatoon Raiders Receives Updates and Additional Content on Switch 2
summary: The shooter game Splatoon Raiders launches on Switch 2 with new content, guides, and support from Monolith Soft.

title: Star Wars Zero Company Will Be a 30-40 Hour Linear Game Without NG+ or Official Mod Support
summary: Bit Reactor confirms that the action game Star Wars Zero Company will not have New Game+ and respects the modding community.

title: Dragon Ball: Sparking! ZERO Releases 'Super Limit-Breaking NEO' DLC on July 30
summary: The new downloadable content for the fighting game includes a new mode and confirmed release date.

title: GSC Game World Denies that Xbox Paid More for Stalker 2 Exclusivity Than Its Development Cost
summary: The developer of Stalker 2 calls its founder's statements about the deal with Microsoft 'not consistent with the facts'.

title: Rockstar Games Union Grows and Celebrates First Meeting with GTA 6 Management
summary: The Rockstar workers' union states that its meeting with studio management was 'a step in the right direction'.

title: Amazon Denies It Will Take James Bond Away from IO Interactive, But Does Not Rule Out Buying the Studio
summary: Amazon Games clarifies its comments about the future of the 007 franchise and the possibility of acquiring the developer.

title: Former PlayStation Boss Shawn Layden Advocates for the Return of Mid-Budget Games
summary: Shawn Layden proposes revitalizing the industry by bringing back double-A titles, offering an alternative to big budgets.

title: Pokémon TCG Pocket Launches 'Ruler of the Skies' Expansion on July 29
summary: The new expansion of the Pokémon collectible card game will include Mega Rayquaza and new cards.

title: LEGO Announces Two New Donkey Kong Sets, Including the Classic Arcade
summary: The LEGO sets based on Donkey Kong will be available in August 2026, including a replica of the original arcade.

title: Blizzard Investigates Cheating Scandal in World of Warcraft Involving a Game Master
summary: A World of Warcraft game master allegedly 'killed' bosses for friends, triggering an investigation by Blizzard.
